message:
Add streaming batch splitting to prevent oversized index batches

Introduces StreamingBatchLimits and next_streaming_batch() to split
connector output into bounded batches (max 64 conversations, 2000
messages, 4MB chars). This prevents a single enormous connector dump
from monopolizing the channel and starving other producers. The first
batch in each split inherits is_discovered=true so discovery stats
remain correct. Replaces inline batch-sending logic in both local and
remote connector paths with the shared send_conversation_batches()
helper.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
